## 🔒 Pentest Coverage (→ #119)

All 5 coverage gaps from the 2026-04-24 analysis remain open:

1. **CRITICAL** — `PentestSuiteTest` has a class-level `@Disabled`: ALL Payment API spec-driven tests are skipped in CI. Only hand-written Stripe tests run. Replace with `assumeTrue(PENTEST_BASE_URL != null)`.
2. `createPayment` — no access-control tests (no IDOR/cross-user probe)
3. `deleteAccount` — no specific happy-flow, no cross-user session test
4. `getI18n` — no access-control test
5. `PENTEST_PROBE_PARAMS` not configured in `pentest-staging` — tests use fallback UUIDs

Known security findings: all 8 have corresponding test implementations. Cross-user session coverage is partial (only `getPaymentTypes` + `getPaymentStatus`).

**Action required:** Fix GAP 1 (`@Disabled`) immediately — every night the Payment API tests silently skip.

### PR #78 — BLOCKED (2 BLOCKING violations)
1. Adds `PENTEST_CREATE_ISSUES=true` to `claude-code-review.yml` — violates CLAUDE.md "opt-in only in nightly-pentest.yml"
2. Shares `PENTEST_BASE_URL` between Stripe and Payment API steps — violates CLAUDE.md "steps must be separate"

Both findings are in the PR description itself. Do not merge until fixed.

### PR #76 — Ownership Check Verification Needed
The PR claims to add an "ownership check test". Per CLAUDE.md, this test must verify the **negative case**: caller with correct `merchantId` but wrong `userId` must receive 403/404, not 200. Requested confirmation in review comment.
